explanations.9: We're converting the NodeList returned by querySelectorAll into a real array so we can use forEach on it; this is an older pattern before JavaScript had better array methods.
explanations.22: This arrow function syntax with parentheses around the parameter is equivalent to function(event) { }, just a more modern way to write it.
explanations.31: Reveal is a library (probably Reveal.js for presentations) that's being used to listen for when slides change so we can update the logo position.
